_meta.keyKnowledge: We present our design ideas, concepts and solutions for specific audiences across fields of design.

_source.w: We present our design ideas, concepts and solutions for specific audiences across fields of design.
y: Professional presentation of design work is essential for communicating our ideas effectively.
Presenting to specific audiences teaches us to tailor our communication approach.
Sharing our design process — not just the final product — demonstrates our thinking and rationale.
eg: We present our design solutions in a professional format appropriate to the field of practice.
We pitch our design concepts to a client or audience, explaining our design rationale.
We create presentation boards or digital portfolios that showcase our design process.
We present mock-ups or prototypes that demonstrate how our design would work in context.
We seek and respond to feedback on our design presentations.
We display our design work in both physical and digital settings.
